emails.subject: Enron T&C information
emails.body: Tana, I may have a need for legal review of a draft MOU and agreement with Oracle in the near future. Dovie tells me you are our primary contact. What is the best process for scheduling time for legal support on an MOU? Steve Forwarded by Stephen Abbanat/Enron Communications on 11/07/00 03:12 PM Dovie Keprta 11/07/00 12:20 PM

emails.subject: Re: Enron T&C information
emails.body: Re: Enron T&C information Call Leslie Hansen at x36121. She is a lawyer and will be able to help you. I am a paralegal that assists her. Stephen Abbanat@ENRON COMMUNICATIONS 11/07/2000 05:14 PM
